description_long: This house features a sprawling, asymmetrical layout with multiple interconnected sections and a mix of roof heights. The exterior is primarily white with a dark, multi-gabled roof, and it includes a combination of flat and pitched roof elements. Large windows are distributed irregularly across the facade, with some arched and others rectangular, providing ample natural light. The front includes a covered porch with wooden railings and a green lawn area, while the rear features a raised deck with planters and a hot tub. A two-car garage is visible on one side, and there are several outdoor living spaces, including balconies and patios. The architectural style blends modern and Mediterranean influences, with clean lines, stucco walls, and subtle decorative details.
description: A large, white house with a dark, multi-gabled roof, asymmetrical layout, and a mix of modern and Mediterranean design elements. Features include a covered porch, large windows, a two-car garage, and multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, wooden railings, and a green lawn area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the multi-level roof, and the rear deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the raised deck with planters, hot tub, and a mix of window shapes and sizes.
description_view_3: Side view with the two-car garage, flat-roofed section, and additional outdoor living space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with wooden railings, double doors, and a small green lawn area
